zh.Eresby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew de Peverel於1260年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，他的父親Thomas Peverell35歲，母親Peverel21歲。他與Lucy de Beke結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1329年在英國享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew de Peverel于1260年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，他的父亲Thomas Peverell35岁，母亲Peverel21岁。他与Lucy de Beke结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1329年在英国享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Peverel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew de Peverel was born in 1260, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas Peverell, was 35 and his mother, Peverel, was 21. He married Lucy de Beke. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1329, in England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew de Peverel est né en 1260, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Peverell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Peverel, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lucy de Beke. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1329, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew de Peverel 1260 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Peverell 35 und seine Mutter Peverel 21. Er hat Lucy de Beke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1329 im Alter von 69 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Peverel è nato il nel 1260 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Peverell, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Peverel, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lucy de Beke. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1329, nel England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew de Peverelが1260年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Peverellは35歳，母Peverelは21歳であった。Lucy de Bekeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1329年にイギリスで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew de Peverel(이)가 1260년 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Peverell(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Peverel(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Lucy de Beke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 영국에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Peverel nasceu em 1260, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Peverell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Peverel, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy de Beke. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1329, em Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew de Peverel родился в 1260 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Peverell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Peverel, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy de Beke. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1329 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew de Peverel nació en 1260, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Peverell, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Peverel, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lucy de Beke. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1329, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
